text: Being here, I feel as if I am standing on the threshold of creativity and knowledge. The environment feels clinical yet alive, with glass walls both dividing and connecting spaces. Entering the inner room of R+D—research and development—I am struck by a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The vibrant colors and innovative displays awaken a playful desire to learn, to experiment, and to redefine boundaries. This space hums with the promise of discovery, and I am eager to see what ideas might emerge from its carefully curated chaos.
